With a strong foundation in Paleobotany, Ishana Mirpuri dedicates herself to the study of ancient flora. Her scholarly journey was notably enhanced by her doctoral advisor, Amish Kumar, whose mentorship has been invaluable. The Harborlight Promise Endowment has served as a primary funding source, allowing her research initiatives to thrive. Besides her research activities, she holds the Hypersilk Weaver Credential, an important professional license in her field. Ishana regularly contributes to Mauve Ember Editions, showcasing her published work and enhancing her profile in the scientific community.
